title: Monday code multi-region support / non-monday code apps
excerpt: Will there be an ability for those of us who have applications predating monday code, which currently (and may never) be able to migrate to monday code, to define base URLs for the various regions in our features (integr…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Will there be an ability for those of us who have applications predating monday code, which currently (and may never) be able to migrate to monday code, to define base URLs for the various regions in our features (integrations)?

Even though its supposedly “complex” to deploy into multiple regions (its not for me) - this would be of great benefit for both compliance and for performance for customers. (and a bit of scaling too)

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
For now, you’ll need to build a single gateway that checks the incoming request’s region and then sends it to the relevant deployment.

Deploying to monday code will be easier, as we’ll handle the routing for you.

But you can convert this to a feature request if you want it considered by our team!
